overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (GTA V) showing a character walking through a sunny urban residential area with palm trees, apartment buildings, and hotels. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses streets at intersections, and passes other pedestrians in a Los Angeles-inspired setting.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunny urban sidewalk next to a pink apartment building. A black sedan drives past on the street as the character crosses the road, with palm trees and traffic lights visible in the background.

entering crosswalk to cross the intersection with other pedestrians

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wide urban intersection using the crosswalk. Other pedestrians are present, including one in yellow waiting and another in gray crossing. The traffic light shows green for walking as the character moves across the white-striped crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: landscaped pedestrian path with tennis courts

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a winding sidewalk bordered by lush green lawns, flowering bushes, and palm trees. To the right, tennis courts are visible behind a tall fence. The path curves gently through this landscaped residential area.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection transitioning to hotel district

turning onto brick-patterned sidewalk in upscale hotel district

black car waiting at the intersection

large white multi-story hotel building with towers

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an intersection, crosses the street alongside other pedestrians, and turns right onto a brick sidewalk. A large white hotel building becomes visible in the background, and the environment shifts to a more upscale area with trimmed hedges and vintage street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale hotel residential sidewalk with palm trees

events.description: passing a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction
palm tree leaves temporarily pass close to the camera view

agents.ego_description: walking along the hotel sidewalk passing a pedestrian

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and jeans walking in opposite direction

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the brick sidewalk of the hotel district, passing a pedestrian walking the other way. Tall palm trees line the path, and the large white hotel building dominates the view ahead. Palm fronds occasionally brush near the camera as the character proceeds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunny urban neighborhood that transitions from a standard residential street into a lush, upscale hotel district. It begins with the character walking past a pink apartment building and crossing a road as a black sedan drives by under the shade of palm trees. As the character navigates a wide, white-striped crosswalk among other pedestrians, the scene shifts toward a more landscaped area featuring winding sidewalks, flowering bushes, and fenced-in tennis courts. The path then leads through another intersection and turns onto a brick sidewalk, where the environment becomes more refined with trimmed hedges and vintage street lamps. Finally, the camera proceeds deep into the hotel district, passing pedestrians beneath towering palm trees as a large white hotel building dominates the horizon.
